Class JpqlQueryBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query.JpqlQueryBuilder
public final class JpqlQueryBuilder extends Object
A Domain-Specific Language to build JPQL queries using Java code.
Since:
4.0
Author:
Mark Paluch, Choi Wang Gyu, Jeongwon Ryu

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.AbstractJpqlQuery
    Abstract base class for JPQL queries.
    static interface 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.AliasedExpression
    Aliased expression.
    static final class 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Entity
    The root entity.
    static interface 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Expression
    Interface specifying an expression that can be rendered to String.
    static final class 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Join
    A joined entity or element collection.
    static interface 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Origin
    An origin that is used to select data from. selection origins are used with paths to define where a path is anchored.
    static final record 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.ParameterPlaceholder
    Value object capturing parameter placeholder.
    static interface 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.PathExpression
    Extension to JpqlQueryBuilder.Expression that contains a PropertyPath.
    static interface 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate
    WHERE predicate.
    static interface 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Renderable
    Interface specifying a predicate or expression that can be rendered to String.
    static class 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.RenderContext
    Context used during rendering.
    static class 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Select
    SELECT statement.
    static interface 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.Selection
    Interface specifying a selection that can be rendered to String.
    static interface 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.SelectStep
    Fluent interface to build a JpqlQueryBuilder.Select.
    static interface 
    JpqlQueryBuilder.WhereStep
    Fluent interface to build a JpqlQueryBuilder.Predicate.

      public static JpqlQueryBuilder.SelectStep selectFrom(JpqlQueryBuilder.Entity from)
      Start building a JpqlQueryBuilder.Select statement by selecting from.

      from - the entity source to select from.
      Returns:
      a new select builder.

      arguments - function arguments.
      Returns:
      an expression representing a function call.
